title: Making Subtraction Stories
description: Create and match stories to subtraction equations

questions.title: Making Subtraction Stories
questions.instruction: Let's make a story that matches this subtraction: 5 - 3 = 2

stories.text: There are 5 cats. 3 run away. How many cats are left?
There are 5 lolipop. 3 lolipop in basket. How many lolipops are left standing?
There are 3 adults on bench and 2 kids playing. How many kids in total?

questions.title: Making Subtraction Stories
questions.instruction: Let's make a story that matches this subtraction: 4 - 1 = 3

stories.text: 4 ducks here. 1 duck flies away. How many ducks are swimming?
3 kids are playing and 1 adult is watching. How many people?
There are 4 flowers. 1 flower with the girl away. How many flowers are left with the boy?
